name: selin-fiori-learning
description: Learning project: SAP Fiori Elements (OData V4) + CAP local backend + an ABAP/RAP reference implementation

cds.//: CAP configuration. 'requires.db.kind = sqlite' with no credentials means an IN-MEMORY database that is rebuilt from db/data/*.csv every time the server starts. Great for learning: you always get the same clean starting point.
